object_a.label: plant
object_a.description: Small potted plant on side table near sofa
object_a.long_form_open_description: Small decorative green plant in a pot placed on the side table next to the lamp. Plant is tabletop-sized and provides a small accent near the sofa.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: On the same side table as the lamp, adjacent to the left sofa.

object_b.description: small decorative potted plant on the right side table
object_b.long_form_open_description: Small green potted plant (likely artificial) placed next to the lamp on the side table; leaves are low-profile and decorative, in a light-colored pot.
